{
	PulseSymbol_t m_DomainIdentifier; // 0x8
	CPulseValueFullType m_DomainSubType; // 0x24
	PulseSymbol_t m_ParentMapName; // 0x48
	PulseSymbol_t m_ParentXmlName; // 0x64
	CUtlVector< CPulse_Chunk* > m_Chunks; // 0x80
	CUtlVector< CPulseCell_Base* > m_Cells; // 0x104
	CUtlVector< CPulse_Variable > m_Vars; // 0x128

	int32 m_iLevelsBetweenUpgrades; // 0x1544

	float32 m_flUpgradeBlend; // 0x1552
	bool m_bUpgradedDuringQuickcastPreview; // 0x1556
	bool m_bConsiderOvershootInGetCastRange; // 0x1557
	bool m_bRefCountsModifiers; // 0x1558
	bool m_bHidden; // 0x1559
	bool m_bOldHidden; // 0x1560
	bool m_bActivated; // 0x1561
	bool m_bOldActivated; // 0x1562
	AbilityBarType_t m_nAbilityBarType; // 0x1564
	int32 m_iDirtyButtons; // 0x1568
	bool m_bPerformDirtyParity; // 0x1572
	int32 m_iLevel; // 0x1576
	bool m_bAbilityLevelDirty; // 0x1580
	bool m_bToggleState; // 0x1581
	float32 m_flAbilityMuteDuration; // 0x1584
	bool m_bInAbilityPhase; // 0x1588
	float32 m_fCooldown; // 0x1592
	float32 m_flCooldownLength; // 0x1596
	int32 m_iManaCost; // 0x1600
	bool m_bAutoCastState; // 0x1604
	bool m_bAltCastState; // 0x1605
	bool m_bLocalAltCastState; // 0x1606
	int32 m_nLocalAltCastChangeSequenceNumber; // 0x1608
	GameTime_t m_flChannelStartTime; // 0x1612
	GameTime_t m_flCastStartTime; // 0x1616
	bool m_bInIndefiniteCooldown; // 0x1620
	bool m_bFrozenCooldown; // 0x1621
	float32 m_flOverrideCastPoint; // 0x1624
	bool m_bStolen; // 0x1628
	bool m_bStealable; // 0x1629
	bool m_bReplicated; // 0x1630
	int32 m_nAbilityCurrentCharges; // 0x1632
	float32 m_fAbilityChargeRestoreTimeRemaining; // 0x1636
	bool m_bUpgradeRecommended; // 0x1640
	int32 m_nMaxLevelOverride; // 0x1644
	int32 m_nRequiredLevelOverride; // 0x1648
	int32 m_nLevelsBetweenUpgradesOverride; // 0x1652
	HeroFacetKey_t m_nHeroFacetKey; // 0x1656
	float32 m_flTotalExtendedChannelTime; // 0x1664
	bool m_bGrantedByFacet; // 0x1668
	bool m_bReflection; // 0x1669
	CHandle< C_BaseEntity > m_pReflectionSourceAbility; // 0x1672
	CHandle< C_BaseEntity > m_hHiddenAbilityForDisplay; // 0x1676
